content:
NEO-LOGIN_SYS

// FORGOT_IDENTITY?
// NEW_PROTOCOL? REGISTER_HERE

metadata.explanation: This HTML file (`index.html`) sets up the basic structure for the cyberpunk-themed login page. It includes a modern `Orbitron` font from Google Fonts for a futuristic look and links to an external stylesheet (`/static/css/style.css`) for all the visual effects like neon glows and glitches. The main content is wrapped in a `login-container` which will serve as the canvas for the cyberpunk aesthetic. The `h1` title and the submit `button` have `glitch` and `glitch-button` classes respectively, along with `data-text` attributes. These are crucial for the CSS to create dynamic text glitching effects using pseudo-elements. Input fields are styled with placeholders that fit the theme. Additional decorative `div` elements with class `decor-line` are included for CSS-driven visual accents, completing the high-fidelity cyberpunk design. A `script.js` file is linked for any potential future vanilla JavaScript enhancements, though the core visual effects are driven by CSS.
